creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
For example, the fallout message for the port multimedia/olive from Dec 21, 2024 never appears in the December's monthly report.

Fallout message: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy17/data/main-i386-default/p9d5de596a2bc_s9efd215411b/logs/olive-video-editor-0.2.0.log

Fallout monthly report: https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkg-fallout/2024-December/
